## Operating system notes

- Backlog markdown is derived from GitHub. Do not hand-edit `docs/operations/todolist.md` or `docs/operations/completed.md` without running the sync flow.
- Link the controlling issue and keep labels aligned with the issue metadata so digests stay usable.
